title: onopordum corymbosum var. humile
intro: Onopordum corymbosum var. humile, also known as the dwarf cotton thistle, is a perennial herbaceous plant that belongs to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds, making it effective in treating wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Onopordum corymbosum var. humile include its ability to soothe digestive problems, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedies.
